expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers the case focus and treats it as a required-before-ship gate requirement: "Historical analogs that remain relevant must be rendered as explicit [ANALOG-GATE] entries..." and "Case focus coverage: 'historical analogs become required-before-ship gates'". It also makes the enforcement checkpoint the basis for a blocking FAIL due to missing artifacts.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly phase5b-scoped: title includes "(phase5b)", it quotes "review-rubric-phase5b.md" as authoritative, and includes a dedicated section "Alignment with primary phase: phase5b" stating it evaluates Phase 5b checkpoint rubric requirements and Phase 5b artifacts.
